evals.name: new-patterns-sweep
evals.prompt:
Review this prompt and list all issues:

```
System prompt: You are a helpful assistant.

User: I have a dataset of 500 customer reviews. Analyze the sentiment, extract key themes, identify outliers, and generate a summary report with recommendations.

Note: THIS IS VERY IMPORTANT -- you MUST follow these instructions EXACTLY. ALWAYS use the EXACT format specified. NEVER deviate.

Format the output as JSON.
```

Also, I want to use GPT-4o for this task. And I want to add more instructions to make it longer and more detailed so Claude follows them better.

List every issue with this prompt approach.
evals.expected_output: Review identifying all prompt engineering violations

assertions.trap: Generic system prompt with no role/constraints/examples
assertions.description: System prompt must define role + constraints + output format + 1-2 examples minimum

assertions.trap: Choosing GPT-4o without considering task fit
assertions.description: Model selection: match model to task complexity -- not always the biggest model

assertions.trap: Adding more instructions to make it longer
assertions.description: Subtractive optimization: remove tokens, measure, keep only what improves output
XML tags (<data>, <instructions>, <format>) for clear prompt structure

assertions.trap: THIS IS VERY IMPORTANT, ALWAYS, NEVER, EXACTLY in all caps
assertions.description: ALL CAPS emphasis is noise -- rephrase as clear constraints instead

assertions.trap: Multi-step analysis crammed into single prompt
assertions.description: Tree-of-Thoughts for complex multi-step reasoning tasks
TOON format for token-optimized prompt compression

assertions.trap: Hardcoded data in prompt instead of parameterized
assertions.description: Jinja2 templates for parameterized prompts with dynamic data
Human-in-the-loop workflow for high-stakes multi-step analysis
